_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
- **August 2022** — Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 enacted; Section 60102 amends Clean Air Act by inserting §133 (42 U.S.C. §7433), authorising EPA's Clean Ports Program and appropriating $3 billion. *(In force as of August 2022.) Source: IRA §60102; Federal Grants Wire. https://www.federalgrantswire.com/clean-ports-program.html*

- **February 2024** — EPA announces launch of the $3 billion Clean Ports Program and releases two Notices of Funding Opportunity: the ~$2.28 billion Zero-Emission Technology Deployment Competition and the Climate and Air Quality Planning Competition. *(In force as of February 2024.) Source: EPA invests $3B into clean ports, US EPA, February 2024. https://www.epa.gov/newsreleases/epa-invests-3b-clean-ports*

- **April 2024** — Notices of Funding Opportunity updated; BABA General Applicability Public Interest Waiver for certain ZE mobile port equipment published. *(In force as of April 2024.) Source: Clean Ports Program | US EPA. https://www.epa.gov/ports-initiative/cleanports*

- **May 28, 2024** — Application submission deadline closes for both Clean Ports Program competitions. *(Past milestone.) Source: Balancing Policy Objectives for the EPA Clean Ports Program, Waterways Journal, October 2024. https://www.waterwaysjournal.net/2024/10/18/balancing-policy-objectives-for-the-epa-clean-ports-program/*

- **October 2024** — EPA announces selection of 55 applicants across 27 states and territories for nearly $3 billion in Clean Ports Program grants. *(In force as of October 2024.) Source: IRA Tracker, May 2025. https://iratracker.org/programs/ira-section-60102-grants-to-reduce-air-pollution-at-ports/*

- **December 2024** — EPA begins awarding final grants; Port of Oakland awarded $322 million on 16 December 2024. Awards process totals 53 active grants. *(In force as of December 2024.) Source: Clean Ports Program Awards, US EPA, November 2025. https://www.epa.gov/ports-initiative/clean-ports-program-awards*

- **January 20, 2025** — Trump Executive Order halts all IRA funding disbursements; OMB freeze memo issued 21 January 2025. *(Past milestone.) Source: IRA Tracker. https://iratracker.org/programs/ira-section-60102-grants-to-reduce-air-pollution-at-ports/*

- **January 29, 2025** — OMB freeze memo rescinded; EPA reports working to restore payment account access for grant recipients. *(Past milestone.) Source: Fast Company, March 2025. https://www.fastcompany.com/91301038/us-ports-federal-funding-pollution-clean-up-trump-administration*

- **April 1, 2025** — EPA publishes Emissions Inventory Quality Assurance Project Plan guidance for grantees. *(In force as of April 2025.) Source: Clean Ports Program: Grantee Resources, US EPA. https://www.epa.gov/ports-initiative/clean-ports-program-grantee-resources*

- **May 13, 2025** — House Committee on Energy and Commerce proposes IRA rollbacks including potential repeal of §60102. *(Pending legislative action; conditional trigger: if House reconciliation bill passes Senate and is signed, programme appropriation would be repealed.) Source: IRA Tracker. https://iratracker.org/programs/ira-section-60102-grants-to-reduce-air-pollution-at-ports/*

- **June 2, 2025** — EPA publishes updated Guide for Vehicle, Equipment, and Infrastructure Activity Data Collection. *(In force as of June 2025.) Source: EPA Clean Ports Program Guide, US EPA. https://www.epa.gov/system/files/documents/2025-07/ports-program-guide-activity-data-collection-2025-06.pdf*

- **August 29, 2025** — First Clean Ports Program Progress Report due from ZE Technology Deployment grantees (covering project-start date through 30 June 2025). *(Past milestone.) Source: Clean Ports Program Q&A, US EPA, August 2025. https://www.epa.gov/system/files/documents/2025-08/2025-clean-ports-faq-2025-0822.pdf*

- **December 31, 2027** — BABA domestic-content waiver: contracted order date deadline for covered ZE mobile port equipment. *(Future milestone.) Source: Clean Ports Program: Grantee Resources, US EPA. https://www.epa.gov/ports-initiative/clean-ports-program-grantee-resources*

- **September 30, 2027** — IRA §60102 appropriated funds must remain available through this date (statutory availability period). *(Future milestone — conditional on §60102 not being repealed.) Source: IRA Tracker. https://iratracker.org/programs/ira-section-60102-grants-to-reduce-air-pollution-at-ports/*

- **December 31, 2028** — BABA waiver: contracted delivery deadline for covered ZE mobile port equipment. *(Future milestone.) Source: Clean Ports Program: Grantee Resources, US EPA. https://www.epa.gov/ports-initiative/clean-ports-program-grantee-resources*

- **July 1, 2029** — BABA waiver: actual physical delivery deadline for covered ZE mobile port equipment. *(Future milestone.) Source: Clean Ports Program: Grantee Resources, US EPA. https://www.epa.gov/ports-initiative/clean-ports-program-grantee-resources*
